title: Frontier Safety Frameworks - RSP, PF, FSF

questions.question: What does Anthropic's ASL structure model itself on?
questions.question_zh: Anthropic 的 ASL 体系是仿照什么设计的？

questions.question: Which OpenAI Preparedness Framework v2 criterion captures 'harm occurs fast or cannot be undone'?
questions.question_zh: OpenAI Preparedness Framework v2 中，哪个标准描述的是 “伤害发生很快或不可逆”？

questions.question: Which Critical Capability Level was added to DeepMind's FSF v3.0 (September 2025)?
questions.question_zh: DeepMind FSF v3.0（2025 年 9 月）新增了哪个 Critical Capability Level？
options_zh: ML R&D Acceleration（ML 研发加速）

questions.question: What is a 'competitor-adjustment clause' in the 2025+ frontier safety frameworks?
options: A provision allowing a lab to reduce safety requirements if peer labs ship without comparable safeguards
A pricing rule for API access
questions.question_zh: 2025 年及以后的前沿安全框架里，“竞争对手调整条款”（competitor-adjustment clause）指什么？
options_zh: 允许实验室在同行没有同等防护的情况下发布模型时，相应降低自身安全要求的条款

questions.question: What are the three standard pillars of a safety case as described in the lesson?
questions.question_zh: 课程中描述的 safety case 的三个标准支柱是什么？

questions.question: Which structural alignment exists across Anthropic's 'Capability Thresholds,' OpenAI's 'High Capability thresholds,' and DeepMind's 'Critical Capability Levels'?
options: Structural alignment: tiered frontier-capability thresholds with published evaluation criteria, even though terminology differs
All three use the exact same evaluations
questions.question_zh: Anthropic 的 “Capability Thresholds”、OpenAI 的 “High Capability thresholds” 和 DeepMind 的 “Critical Capability Levels” 之间存在怎样的结构性一致？
options_zh: 结构上一致：都是分级的前沿能力阈值，并配有公开的评估标准，尽管术语不同
术语和数值切分点完全相同
三者使用完全相同的评估方法
